subject.description: A drained marketing professional in a crumpled button-down shirt.
subject.action: Looking directly into the camera with heavy, tired eyes, completely burnt out from babysitting AI tools like a junior hire all day.

composition.framing: Centered close-up. MUST follow cropping rules: cut above eyebrows, always give the chin breathing room, no boxing the chin, never cut in flesh.

camera_settings.depth_of_field: Extremely low depth of field. Only the eyes and central facial features are in sharp focus.

lighting.type: Soft, diffused natural light from a nearby window.
lighting.color_grading: Raw, muted colors, authentic skin texture with visible fatigue.

negative_prompt: Things that MUST NOT appear: text, watermarks, deformities, bad anatomy, smooth skin filters, cut off chins, weird framing.
